competitors.name: LVMH
competitors.creative_approach: Heritage storytelling with celebrity face of brand

competitors.name: Richemont
competitors.creative_approach: Ultra-premium product focus with technical craftsmanship

competitors.name: Burberry
competitors.creative_approach: British identity with youth cultural references
weaknesses: Caught between luxury and accessible positioning
Lower price perception vs. LVMH peers

competitors.name: Prada Group
weaknesses: Complex brand codes require high brand literacy

market_gaps: Premium print dominance being vacated as all majors shift to digital
Genuine editorial scarcity — competitors over-post reducing luxury premium
Invitation-only private events as direct conversion channel largely unused
HNW 40-55 women underserved by Kering's youth-pivot and LVMH's over-exposure
strategic_recommendations: Reclaim print: own Vogue Paris, IT, UK full-page placements exclusively for autumn season
Cap Instagram posting at 3 editorial images per week maximum — enforce scarcity
Private preview events in Paris and London with <100 guests: controlled exclusivity
Target HNW 40-55 segment explicitly — gap vacated by Kering's youth-pivot
